name: jlcpcb-parts
description: JLCPCB/LCSC part search and cost-aware BOM suggestion for KiCad projects: 8 MCP tools (search, parametric passives, alternatives, KiCad analysis, BOM suggestion, assembly cost, import symbol/footprint/3D into KiCad) plus a part-selection skill (basic/preferred/extended tiers, loading fees, stock risk).
